Description: Implement shared domain objects for instruments, market snapshots, strategy signals, decisions, risk events, orders, holdings, portfolio state, and bot runs.

Description: Implement safe configuration, CSV input validation, structured logging, and credential handling.

Description: Resolve YAML versus JSON and implement config loading and validation.

Epic Link: Configuration CSV Logging And Security
Description: Load Upstox access tokens from environment variables, secure prompt, or approved secret storage.
Acceptance Criteria: Tokens are never logged or stored; missing credentials fail closed where API access is required; access_token_env is supported; redaction tests exist.

Epic Link: Configuration CSV Logging And Security
Description: Read target company watchlist CSV and produce validated instrument definitions.

Epic Link: Configuration CSV Logging And Security
Description: Validate CSV rows according to SRS rules before startup.

Epic Link: Configuration CSV Logging And Security
Summary: Implement structured logging with rotation and redaction
Description: Add rotating logs with configurable levels and secret redaction.

Epic Name: Market Data And Upstox API Client

Acceptance Criteria: Auth headers applied securely; request metadata records response codes, retries, and latency; transient failures use backoff and jitter; non-retryable errors are not retried blindly.

Epic Link: Market Data And Upstox API Client
Description: Fetch latest traded price using Upstox V3 market quote APIs or streaming-compatible abstraction.

Epic Link: Market Data And Upstox API Client
Summary: Implement OHLCV candle retrieval and caching
Description: Fetch historical OHLCV candle data for configurable intervals and cache results in SQLite.

Epic Link: Market Data And Upstox API Client
Summary: Add WebSocket market data feed support
Description: Prefer WebSocket feeds for live monitoring to reduce REST polling.
Acceptance Criteria: Market data thread receives stream updates; disconnects are logged and retried; strategy workers consume immutable snapshots; REST fallback is configurable.

Epic Link: Market Data And Upstox API Client
Description: Refresh funds, holdings, positions, and order state through standard APIs.
Acceptance Criteria: Funds available for buy risk checks; holdings available for sell risk checks; portfolio state is lock-protected; non-critical failures do not stop exit monitoring when possible.

Description: Build indicator calculations, modular strategy classes, initial buy/sell strategies, and signal aggregation.

Epic Link: Indicators Strategies And Signal Aggregation

Epic Link: Indicators Strategies And Signal Aggregation
Description: Implement version 1 buy strategies chosen from SRS options.

Epic Link: Indicators Strategies And Signal Aggregation
Description: Create extension points or backlog stubs for RSI bullish divergence, trendline support bounce, resistance breakout, and volume breakout confirmation.

Epic Link: Indicators Strategies And Signal Aggregation
Description: Aggregate strategy signals using any, all, and weighted_score modes.

Epic Name: Exit Engine Risk Management And Safety Gates
Summary: Exit Engine Risk Management And Safety Gates

Epic Link: Exit Engine Risk Management And Safety Gates
Summary: Implement exit engine with priority rules
Description: Monitor holdings and generate exit decisions using the SRS exit priority order.

Epic Link: Exit Engine Risk Management And Safety Gates
Description: Validate every buy and sell decision before an order is queued.
Acceptance Criteria: Trading mode, enabled stock, strategy profile, session, quantity, max position, order count, order value, daily traded value, funds, holdings, and duplicate orders are checked; every rejection records reason code.

Epic Link: Exit Engine Risk Management And Safety Gates
Description: Add an immediate live-order block controlled by atomic state.
Acceptance Criteria: Kill switch blocks new live orders immediately; dry-run decisions can continue when safe; state is thread-safe; activation and deactivation logged.

Epic Link: Exit Engine Risk Management And Safety Gates
Summary: Implement market session and order window checks
Description: Prevent order placement outside configured market sessions and allowed order windows.
Acceptance Criteria: Configurable session window supported; outside-window orders rejected with reason code; boundary tests exist; live mode fails closed when session rules cannot be evaluated.

Epic Link: Exit Engine Risk Management And Safety Gates
Description: Document operational checks for static IP, optional approved algo name header, OAuth, 2FA, broker restrictions, exchange rules, and SEBI constraints.
Acceptance Criteria: Live checklist documented; static IP represented in config validation or preflight checks; X-Algo-Name sent only when configured; bot never bypasses broker or regulatory controls.

Summary: Order Management Concurrency And Rate Limits

Epic Link: Order Management Concurrency And Rate Limits
Description: Process order requests by priority and timestamp.

Epic Link: Order Management Concurrency And Rate Limits
Description: Route all Upstox API calls through centralized token-bucket or leaky-bucket limiters.

Epic Link: Order Management Concurrency And Rate Limits
Description: Build the single controlled component allowed to place, modify, or cancel orders, initially in dry-run mode.

Epic Link: Order Management Concurrency And Rate Limits

Epic Link: Order Management Concurrency And Rate Limits

Epic Link: Order Management Concurrency And Rate Limits
